Appearances:

Plaintiff JOHN STEWART COMPANY, is present. Represented by ROBERT MALL.
Attorney JOHN ZHANGI, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant RASHANDA STRUGGS, is present.
Attorney SARAH MARRIOTT, representing the defendant through limited (use full if name appears on cal) scope.
The Judge Pro Tem DENNIS HYDE, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of MAY 9, 2011 is vacated.
